data.title: Tesla Owners Call On Elon Musk For Advanced Security Features Amid Rising Vandalism: 'There Definitely Is Fear Right Now'
data.description: In the wake of escalating vandalism incidents, Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) owners are calling on CEO Elon Musk to implement enhanced security features.

data.title: Amazon Takes On Used Car Market, Expands Its Auto Platform To 68 Markets: Report
data.description: Amazon expands into used cars through the Amazon Autos platform. Aims to assist dealers and streamline the car-buying process for customers.

data.title: Anatomy Of A Correction: Magnificent 7 Fall Mirrors 2022 Pattern But It's Comparable To 2018: Caused By Repricing Of 'Animal Spirits' Explains Expert
data.description: Data from Fidelity Investments reveals that the current market correction closely mirrors the 2022 correction but it is more like 2018.

data.title: Boeing Frustrations Reach Crescendo At Airline Founded By Warren Buffett Of India: 'We Just Don't Have Enough Aircraft To Fly'
data.description: Akasa Air struggles with Boeing's delivery delays, leaving executives frustrated and pilots idle.
